faults.DBCC: Although Shutdown(Execute) sent was went the light not off. (Error Light Not Off).
faults.DBCE: Although Shutdown(Execute) sent was went the light not off. (Error Light Not Off).
faults.DBD0: Ring break diagnosis was performed (Error Ring diagnosis).
faults.DBD1: Long and/or frequent Unlocks (Error Unlock Long).
faults.DBD2: On Device has itself due to overtemperature shut off (Error temperature Shutdown).
